history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A person wearing a black hooded sweatshirt with "NOAH" and a red cross logo in white lettering, a black baseball cap, and baggy light-wash jeans stands in a brightly lit, modern hallway. The hallway has vibrant lime green walls and floor. To the left, a white tiled staircase descends, with a person in a black hijab visible at the bottom. Above the staircase, a sign displays "原宿駅" in Japanese characters and "Harajuku Station" in English, set against a white and yellow background. The person in the foreground is holding a canvas tote bag with a busy black and white graffiti-style print and red straps. The lighting is even and bright, creating a slightly surreal and urban atmosphere. The overall mood is casual and contemporary, with a hint of anonymity due to the person's hooded figure.
